allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(x.get\('created_on'\), '| source=', x.get\('source'\), '| author=', x.get\('author_email'\)\) for x in d.get\('result',{}\).get\('deployments',[]\)[:5]]")
